message:
fix(server): symlink-safe static file serving and export via O_NOFOLLOW

Static file serving (static_files.rs):
- Replace path.is_file() lookups with O_NOFOLLOW openat() traversal on
  Unix, opening each path component individually with O_NOFOLLOW to
  prevent symlink escape from the web root at every directory level
- Add non-Unix fallback that uses the existing is_safe_path() check
- Add normalized_relative_path() to sanitize URL paths before joining
  (rejects ParentDir, RootDir, Prefix components)
- Harden web root candidate detection: only accept directories that
  look like a source tree root (has Cargo.toml, .git, or crates/) to
  avoid serving unrelated ~/web trees when binary is installed under
  ~/.local/bin
- Add is_real_directory()/is_real_file() helpers using symlink_metadata
- Add is_valid_web_root_candidate() that rejects symlinked web roots
  and symlinked index.html files
- Add nix dependency with "fs" feature for openat/OFlag support

Static export (static_export.rs):
- Add ensure_real_directory() that creates directories one component at
  a time, rejecting symlinks and ParentDir at each step
- Replace fs::create_dir_all() with ensure_real_directory() in
  write_html(), write_to_file(), and write_and_record()
- Add symlink checks before writing to destination files
- Reject symlinked output directories in ensure_output_dir_empty()

Adds tests for symlink escape via exact file symlinks, symlinked
directory components, symlinked web roots, and symlinked descendant
directories in export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
